name: Pika
tagline: Fast and fun AI video generator for social media and creative content
description: Pika is an AI video generation platform designed for speed and accessibility. It generates short video clips from text or image prompts, with features like Pikaffects (transform videos with wild AI effects), lip sync, and sound effects. It's particularly popular for creating social media content, product demos, and creative experiments.
pros: Most affordable video generation entry point ($8/mo)
cons: Lower quality than Runway for professional use
bestFor: Social media creators wanting quick fun clips
keyStrength: Fastest workflow for short creative video clips
